title: Xbox restructures with possible studio closures and executive resignations
summary: Reports indicate that Microsoft plans to close several Xbox studios while its studio head resigns in a reorganization.

title: EA launches a platform to insert ads directly into games
summary: Electronic Arts presents a system that allows brands to integrate advertising in the middle of gameplay, generating controversy.

title: Steam Next Fest June 2026 offers over 4,000 free demos
summary: The Steam event allows you to try thousands of upcoming games, standing out for its large volume of content.

title: Capcom removes microtransactions from Dragon's Dogma 2 after controversy
summary: The controversial in-game purchases disappear in an update, preparing the ground for the studio's next release.

title: Overwatch introduces Shion, a new hero inspired by John Wick and action cinema
summary: Season 3 introduces Shion with combo abilities, new skins, and a content-packed battle pass.

title: Dead by Daylight celebrates 10 years with new features and a movie in development
summary: The horror game announces a visual overhaul, collaboration with Scooby-Doo, and its film adaptation finds a director.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its final update with new missions and portable improvement
summary: The latest update adds additional story content and optimizations for Switch 2.

title: The entire Final Fantasy saga on sale on Steam, including FF7 remakes
summary: Square Enix discounts all titles of the franchise on Steam amid the hype for Final Fantasy 7 Revelation.

title: The 2026 Nintendo Direct was the most watched of Summer Game Fest and suggests a Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake
summary: Nintendo's event was the most followed, and details leaked about a faithful remake of the Zelda classic.

title: Blizzard sues a World of Warcraft private server for copyright infringement
summary: The company accuses the unofficial server of illegally generating millions of dollars with MMO content.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved announces release date and climbs in PlayStation pre-orders
summary: The Xbox exclusive positions itself well on PS5 pre-order lists after its announcement.

title: House of the Dragon season 3 aims to redeem itself with the Battle of the Gullet
summary: Early reviews indicate a significant improvement in the series, though it still carries issues.

title: Ultimate Marvel vs. Capcom 3 receives a surprise patch that breaks a top-tier character
summary: The first update in nearly a decade alters the balance of the fighting game, affecting a high-level fighter.

title: Nintendo releases system update 22.5.0 for Switch and Switch 2
summary: The new software version brings stability improvements and general fixes.

title: Mark Gordon, head of Treyarch, leaves the studio after nearly a decade
summary: The studio head responsible for Call of Duty leaves his position amid company changes.

title: UK to apply social media ban to video game services for minors
summary: The new law will affect online game platforms, although multiplayer sessions will be exempt.

title: A Super Mario Bros. cartridge sells for $3 million at auction
summary: An unopened copy of the NES classic reaches a record price at auction.

title: Hacker group claims to have stolen Nintendo data and demands $2 million ransom
summary: Cybercriminals threaten to leak sensitive information if Nintendo does not pay the ransom.

title: Capcom attributes its success to betting on teams instead of visionaries
summary: The change in development philosophy, prioritizing teamwork over star directors, has been key to the recovery.

title: BioWare co-founder tried to make Baldur's Gate 3 for years before Larian
summary: The veteran developer says he tried to get the rights to make the game, but doesn't envy Larian's success.
